acceptance.dataCorrectness: Payload shape and key fields match OpenAPI contract.
acceptance.states: Loading, empty and error states are user-visible and non-blocking.
acceptance.offlineWarmCache: Cached data is rendered when offline and revalidates on reconnect.

acceptance.dataCorrectness: Team and league views resolve from contract-compliant responses.
acceptance.states: Missing optional blocks degrade gracefully without crashes.
acceptance.offlineWarmCache: Most recent team snapshot remains available offline.

acceptance.dataCorrectness: Career and match aggregates are contract-aligned.
acceptance.states: Fallback content appears when partial player data is unavailable.
acceptance.offlineWarmCache: Last viewed player context is shown offline.

acceptance.dataCorrectness: Standings and fixtures remain consistent across platforms.
acceptance.offlineWarmCache: Last queried competition can be opened while offline.

acceptance.dataCorrectness: Search and trend results use the same contract fields everywhere.
acceptance.states: Debounced search behaves consistently for empty/no-result/error responses.
acceptance.offlineWarmCache: Trend views display cached response when offline.
